/** Add this to a document to index lat/lon or x/y/z point, indexed as a dimensional value.
 *  Multiple values are allowed: just add multiple Geo3DPoint to the document with the
 *  same field name.
 *
 *  @lucene.experimental */
javadoc_after:
/** * Add this to a document to index lat/lon or x/y/z point, indexed as a 3D point. * Multiple values are allowed: just add multiple Geo3DPoint to the document with the * same field name. *

* This field defines static factory methods for creating a shape query: *

    *
  • {@link #newShapeQuery newShapeQuery()} for matching all points inside a specified shape *
* * @lucene.experimental */
